name: Clarocity Corporation
summary: Clarocity Corporation designs and develops real estate valuation and report products. The company develops software for residential housing appraisal research in the metropolitan areas throughout the United States, as well as a suite of realtor powered valuation products. It also provides alternative valuation and appraisal fulfillment services. The company was formerly known as Zaio Corporation and changed its name to Clarocity Corporation in October 2016. Clarocity Corporation is headquartered in Carlsbad, California.
